mapper.select:
select job.id, algorithm.id AS algorithm_id, algorithm.name AS algorithm_name, job.job_status as jobStatus, dataset.id AS dataset_id, job.insert_user_id as insertUserId, job.insert_time as insertTime, job.update_time as updateTime, job.result_path as resultPath, job.error_message as errorMessage, job.started_time as startedTime, job.completed_time as completedTime, job.parameters as parameters, nc.id AS nc_id, nc.name AS nc_ncName, nc.title AS nc_title, nc.band_number AS nc_bandNumber, nc.nc_path AS nc_ncPath, nc.img_path AS nc_imgPath, nc.start_time AS nc_startTime, nc.end_time AS nc_endTime, ST_AsGeoJSON(nc.geometry) AS nc_ncGeometry, china_match.name AS nc_name, china_match.gb AS nc_gb, china_match.geometry AS nc_geometry, nc.satellite_type AS nc_satelliteType, nc.resolution AS nc_resolution, nc.img_type AS nc_imgType, nc.process_type AS nc_processType from job LEFT JOIN algorithm ON job.fk_algorithm_id = algorithm.id LEFT JOIN dataset ON job.fk_dataset_id = dataset.id LEFT JOIN nc_dataset ON dataset.id = nc_dataset.dataset_id LEFT JOIN nc ON nc_dataset.nc_id = nc.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT c.name, c.gb, ST_AsGeoJSON(c.geometry) AS geometry FROM china c WHERE nc.geometry IS NOT NULL AND ST_Contains(nc.geometry, c.geometry) LIMIT 1 ) china_match ON true dataset.del_flag = false and job.insert_user_id = #{user.userno}
order by job.id limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from job 1=1 and job.insert_user_id = #{user.userno}
insert into job(fk_algorithm_id, fk_dataset_id, insert_user_id, insert_time, job_status) values(#{algorithm_id}, #{dataset_id}, #{user.userno}, now(), 'PEN') returning id

insert into job(fk_algorithm_id, fk_dataset_id, insert_user_id, insert_time, job_status, parameters) values(#{algorithm_id}, #{dataset_id}, #{user.userno}, now(), 'PEN', #{parameters}::jsonb) returning id
mapper.update: update job set job_status = #{job_status}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}

update job set job_status = #{job_status}, update_time = now(),
started_time = now(),
completed_time = now(),
result_path = #{result_path},
error_message = #{error_message} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, description, category, input_type as inputType, output_type as outputType, parameters_schema as parametersSchema, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder from algorithm where is_active = true order by sort_order limit #{page_size} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from algorithm where is_active = true

select id, name, description, category, input_type as inputType, output_type as outputType, parameters_schema as parametersSchema, is_active as isActive, sort_order as sortOrder from algorithm where is_active = true order by category, sort_order
